Quarterly Operations Report

Revenue grew to 45,000 dollars in Q3, up 12% from the prior quarter. The team shipped 1,250 units before 10/15/2023. Alice Johnson led the rollout.

Costs were held at 32,500 dollars despite supplier churn. The new vendor signed on 09/01/2023. Bob Smith negotiated the contract.

Headcount reached 48 by the end of the quarter. Attrition stayed below 5% for the third consecutive period.

Inventory turnover improved to 8.4 cycles. Warehouse capacity sits at 78% utilization, with 2,300 pallets on hand as of 11/01/2023.

The outlook for Q4 projects 52,000 dollars in revenue. Carol Davis presented the forecast to the board on 11/20/2023.
